name: logos
title: Logos
description: Quickly capture timestamped notes into daily markdown files
author: ThomasIseli

commands.name: memorize
commands.title: Memorize
commands.description: Quickly capture a timestamped note into today's daily note

preferences.name: notesDirectory
preferences.title: Notes Directory
preferences.description: The directory where daily notes will be saved

preferences.name: filenameTemplate
preferences.title: Filename Template
preferences.description: Date format pattern for the daily note filename. Tokens: YYYY, MM, DD, dddd (full weekday), ddd (short weekday), MMMM (full month), MMM (short month). Day/month names follow system locale.

preferences.name: templateFile
preferences.title: Template File
preferences.description: Optional path to a markdown template file for new daily notes (e.g. an Obsidian template). Supports {{title}}, {{date}}, {{date:FORMAT}}, {{time}}, {{time:FORMAT}} variables.

scripts.prepublishOnly:
echo "

It seems like you are trying to publish the Raycast extension to npm.

If you did intend to publish it to npm, remove the \`prepublishOnly\` script and rerun \`npm publish\` again.
If you wanted to publish it to the Raycast Store instead, use \`npm run publish\` instead.

" && exit 1
